News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

  • Drone crashed near US diplomats in Baghdad Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- ‎A drone crashed near a group of US diplomats at Baghdad International Airport earlier this week, Iraqi officials said, as they were escorting an American journalist recently released by Kataeb Hezbollah resistance group.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • U.S. Forces Start Mine Clearance Mission in Strait of Hormuz CENTCOM 11 Apr 2026 -- U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) forces began setting conditions for clearing mines in the Strait of Hormuz, April 11, as two U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers conducted operations.
  • US Central Command Says Clearing Mines In Strait Of Hormuz RFE/RL 11 Apr 2026 -- Following earlier reports of US naval vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, the US Central Command (CENTCOM) has now named two ships that it says are clearing mines in the crucial waterway.

  • IRGC Navy warns military vessels of 'firm response' to attempts at crossing Strait of Hormuz Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC)'s Navy has warned military vessels of a "firm response" to their potential attempts at passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

  • Multiple Hurdles To Peace As US, Iranian Delegations Gather RFE/RL 11 Apr 2026 -- US Vice President JD Vance has stepped into the most consequential diplomatic challenge of his tenure, arriving in Islamabad to lead high-stakes negotiations with Iran.
  • White House Says 'In-Person' Iran Talks Ongoing In Early Morning Hours Of April 12 RFE/RL 11 Apr 2026 -- A senior White House official said that "in-person" trilateral talks involving US, Iranian, and Pakistani officials were ongoing in the early morning hours of April 12 as negotiators looked to battle through several contentious issues in hopes of reaching a peace deal.
  • Iran, US end third round of Pakistan-mediated negotiations; talks extended for another day Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Iran and the United States have ended the third round of Pakistan-mediated ceasefire negotiations in Islamabad pending fresh resumption of the talks on Sunday.

  • Vance Leads Critical Diplomacy With Iran As Cease-Fire Hangs In The Balance RFE/RL 11 Apr 2026 -- US Vice President JD Vance has stepped into the most consequential diplomatic challenge of his tenure, heading to Islamabad to lead high-stakes negotiations with Iran.
  • Vance warns Iran not to "play" U.S. before leaving for talks in Pakistan People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- U.S. Vice President JD Vance on Friday left Washington for Islamabad, Pakistan, warning Iran not to "play" the United States in the upcoming negotiation, which he expects would be "positive."
  • Trump says Iran has "no cards" except Hormuz Strait ahead of Islamabad talks, as Iran declares army "at full readiness" People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump has stepped up pressure ahead of U.S.-Iran talks set for Saturday in Islamabad, Pakistan, claiming on Friday that Iran has "no cards" other than short-term "extortion" with the Strait of Hormuz.
  • Trump threatens Strait of Hormuz to open no matter if Iran cooperates People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said Friday U.S. negotiators will discuss the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz with the Iranians in Pakistan on Saturday, asserting the crucial global energy waterway will reopen soon and "automatically," with or without Iran's cooperation.
  • Secretary Rubio Terminates Green Cards of Foreign Nationals Tied to Infamous Iranian Regime Propagandist US Dept. of State 11 Apr 2026 -- This week, three Iranian nationals with ties to the Iranian regime were arrested by federal agents following Secretary of State Marco Rubio's termination of their lawful permanent resident (LPR) statuses.

  • Axis of Resistance stronger than ever: IRGC Quds Force cmdr. Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- The commander of the Quds Force of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) asserts that the regional Axis of Resistance today exhibits more strength and resilience than any other time throughout its history.
  • Iran entered talks with seriousness, outcome depends on US approach: Pezeshkian Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian says Iran has entered the talks with the United States in Islamabad with "determination and seriousness," stressing that the success of the process depends on Washington's approach.
  • Pezeshkian: Iranian negotiators defending national interests in Islamabad talks Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian says Iran's senior negotiators are wholeheartedly defending national interests during the ongoing talks with the American side in the Pakistani capital of Islamabad aimed at putting a permanent end to a US-Israeli war of aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran ready for 'all scenarios' as it holds talks with US: Deputy FM Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister for Legal Affairs Kazem Gharibabadi says the Islamic Republic is fully prepared for all scenarios in its ongoing negotiations with the United States.
  • Frozen assets: Iran's non-negotiable condition for talks with US in Islamabad Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- As negotiations between Iran and the United States draw closer in Islamabad, one central issue dominating discussions is the release of Iran's frozen assets.
  • Iran-US talks in Islamabad, mediated by Pakistan, enter expert-level phase Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Iran and the United States have begun a first round of negotiations in the Pakistani capital of Islamabad aimed at permanently ending a US-Israeli war of aggression against the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran VP: Deal possible if US negotiators are America Firsters rather than Israel Firsters Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Iran's Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref says a deal with the United States is possible if American negotiators adopt an "America First" approach, warning that talks would fail if they instead pursue an "Israel First" agenda.
  • Iran enters talks with US in Islamabad with 'complete distrust': FM Araghchi Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says Iran is entering negotiations with the United States in Pakistan with "complete distrust" due to Washington's repeated breaches of commitment and treachery against diplomacy.
  • Timing of Iran-US talks to be determined once preconditions clarified: Report Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- The timing of talks between Iran and the US in Pakistan will be determined once the preconditions are clarified, according to a report by Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting (IRIB).
  • Iranian delegates arrive in Pakistan, while distrust keeps weighing on talks with U.S. People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- The Iranian delegation led by Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf arrived here early Saturday for talks with the United States to end the hostilities in the Middle East. However, distrust between the two adversaries still shadows their peace talks scheduled for later on the day.
  • Iran says armed forces remain at full readiness, warns Israel not to continue attacks on Lebanon People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- Iran's main military command, Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, said on Friday its armed forces remain at full readiness, as during the 40-day "asymmetric battle," given the "frequent breaches of promises" by the United States and Israel.

  • Iran's missile arsenal largely intact despite weeks of airstrikes: US intel. Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- ‎A‎ new report indicates that US intelligence assessments show Iran still possesses an arsenal of thousands of ballistic missiles, directly contradicting claims that weeks of joint US-Israeli military strikes have significantly degraded the country's strategic capabilities.‎

  • UN chief welcomes U.S.-Iran talks mediated by Pakistan: spokesperson People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres welcomes the U.S.-Iran talks that are mediated by Pakistan, scheduled to start in Islamabad over the weekend, his spokesperson said Friday.

  • Saudi Arabia Condemns Iranian Heinous Attacks Targeting Several Vital Facilities in Kuwait SPA 11 Apr 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs expressed the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's strong condemnation and denunciation of the heinous attacks that targeted a number of vital facilities in the State of Kuwait, carried out by Iran, its proxies, and affiliated groups
  • HRH the Crown Prince, French President Discuss Regional Situation Following US-Iran Ceasefire SPA 11 Apr 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received a phone call from President Emmanuel Macron of the French Republic, during which they reviewed the latest regional developments in light of the ceasefire announcement between the United States and Iran

Defense Policy / Programs

  • USS Harvey C. Barnum, Jr. (DDG 124) Commissions US Navy 11 Apr 2026 -- The U.S. Navy welcomed a new Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer to the fleet Saturday morning during the commissioning ceremony of USS Harvey C. Barnum Jr. (DDG 124) at Naval Station Norfolk.

  • Baiba Braže at the NATO Parliamentary Assembly: NATO unity and the 5% defence spending target is critical to Europe's security Latvia MFA 11 Apr 2026 -- The Minister of Foreign Affairs, Baiba Braže, addressing the NATO Parliamentary Assembly Standing Committee in Riga, emphasised that Allies at the NATO summit in Ankara must demonstrate significant progress in increasing defence spending, while strengthening technological superiority and maintaining a unified approach to security within a 360-degree strategy.

  • Ukraine and Norway to expand cooperation in air defence, drones and defence innovation Ukraine MOD 11 Apr 2026 -- Ukraine and Norway agreed on priority areas for defence cooperation ahead of the upcoming Ramstein-format meeting of the Ukraine Defense Contact Group, scheduled for April 15.

  • National security is a collective duty, its strength is determined through unity, discipline & awareness among people: Raksha Mantri India PIB 11 Apr 2026 -- "National security, an indispensable pillar of India's journey towards Viksit Bharat, is a collective duty of every citizen, and not the sole responsibility of the defence forces," said Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh at an event in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh on April 11, 2026. He asserted that while soldiers remain the first line of defence, the strength of national security is equally determined through unity, discipline and awareness among the people.

  • Ministry of Defense: Pakistani Military Force Arrives in Saudi Arabia Under Strategic Mutual Defense Agreement SPA 11 Apr 2026 -- The Ministry of Defense announced today the arrival of a military force from the Islamic Republic of Pakistan at King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector, acting in accordance with the Strategic Mutual Defense Agreement signed between the two countries

  • "Anatolian Phoenix-2026" international exercise successfully completed Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 11 Apr 2026 -- "Anatolian Phoenix - 2026" International Search and Rescue Exercise is progressing successfully in the city of Konya of fraternal Türkiye, Azerbaijan`s Ministry of Defense told AZERTAC.

  • Minister for Armed Forces speech at the London Defence Conference UK MOD 11 Apr 2026 -- The Minister for Armed Forces delivered a closing speech at the London Defence Conference.

  • Estonia to Procure Additional HIMARS Launchers and Ammunition Estonia CDI 11 Apr 2026 -- The Estonian Centre for Defence Investments (ECDI) and US defence company Lockheed Martin have signed a contract for the procurement of three additional HIMARS multiple rocket systems. The agreement also includes an investment of approximately USD 11 million into Estonia's defence industry.

  • US Revisits Georgia's Black Sea Port as Strategic Corridors Rise RFE/RL 11 Apr 2026 -- After nearly two years of suspended engagement under a multiyear strategic partnership, the United States has resumed high-level contact with Georgia. On March 30, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio held a phone call with Georgian Prime Minister Irakli Kobakhidze.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • April 11: Hezbollah's operations against Zionist regime in response to truce breach Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Hours after Iran and the United States announced a ceasefire ending 40 days of aggression against the Islamic Republic, the Israeli regime violated the truce on Wednesday by launching devastating strikes on civilian areas across Lebanon.

  • Israeli strikes kill 10 people in southern Lebanon Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- The Lebanese health ministry says ten people, including three emergency workers, have been killed by Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon, as the occupying regime continues its aggression across the region.

  • Hamas, Islamic Jihad slam Smotrich's remarks on Gaza land expropriation Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Palestinian resistance movements Hamas and Islamic Jihad have denounced the latest remarks by Israeli Minister of Finance Bezalel Smotrich concerning plans to expropriate land from the war-ravaged Gaza Strip, saying they confirm the regime's intentions to undermine the 2024 November ceasefire.

  • Minister of Development Åsmund Aukrust: 'It is heartbreaking that innocent Lebanese people are being affected' Government of Norway 11 Apr 2026
  • No: 70, 11 April 2026, Regarding the Social Media Post by Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu Republic of Turkey Ministry of Foreign Affairs 11 Apr 2026
  • Spanish PM urges EU to suspend Association Agreement with Israel People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Friday called on the European Union (EU) to suspend its Association Agreement with Israel, given its continued bombardment of Lebanon and actions in Gaza.

    • Other Conflicts

News Reports

  • NASA Science, Cargo Launch Aboard Northrop Grumman CRS-24 NASA 11 Apr 2026 -- NASA is sending more science, technology demonstrations, and crew supplies to the International Space Station following the successful launch of the agency's Northrop Grumman Commercial Resupply Services 24 mission, or Northrop Grumman CRS-24.

  • UK drops Chagos sovereignty bill after Trump withdraws backing: Report Azerbaijan State News Agency - (AZERTAC) 11 Apr 2026 -- Britain has shelved legislation to transfer sovereignty of the Chagos Islands to Mauritius after US President Donald Trump withdrew support, according to Anadolu Agency.

  • Deployment of New Low-Orbital Broadband Communications Satellite Group 'Major Event' - Putin Sputnik 11 Apr 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin called the deployment of the new low-orbital broadband communications satellite group a "major event."
  • Meeting with Krasnodar Territory Governor Veniamin Kondratyev President of Russia 11 Apr 2026
  • Excerpt from Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov' interview for Russian Public Television, Moscow, April 11, 2026 Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 11 Apr 2026
  • US Condemns Russia Over Targeting Journalists, Urges Respect for Free Speech RFE/RL 11 Apr 2026 -- The United States has condemned Russia's latest actions against independent media following reports of new detentions and a high-profile newsroom raid in Moscow.

  • Cheng-Xi meeting seen as Beijing signal to Trump on Taiwan: Scholars CNA 11 Apr 2026 -- A recent meeting between Kuomintang (KMT) Chair Cheng Li-wun (鄭麗文) and Chinese President Xi Jinping (習近平) was viewed by scholars as a signal from Beijing to U.S. President Donald Trump on Taiwan ahead of their expected talks.
  • KMT chair's Taiwan Strait remark 'playing with fire': Premier Cho CNA 11 Apr 2026 -- Premier Cho Jung-tai (卓榮泰) said on Saturday that Kuomintang (KMT) Chairperson Cheng Li-wun (鄭麗文) was "playing with fire" with her remark a day earlier that the Taiwan Strait should "never be a chessboard for interference by external forces."
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 11 Apr 2026
  • KMT chairwoman says willing to do anything helpful to cross-Strait ties People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- Cheng Li-wun, chairwoman of the Chinese Kuomintang (KMT) party who is on a visit on the Chinese mainland, said Friday in Beijing that she is willing to "do anything as long as it helps promote peace across the Taiwan Strait."
  • Xi meets KMT leader, urges joint efforts to promote cross-Strait peace, oppose "Taiwan independence" secession People's Daily 11 Apr 2026 -- Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China (CPC) Central Committee, met on Friday with Cheng Li-wun, chairwoman of the Chinese Kuomintang (KMT) party, in the first meeting between the leaders of the two parties in a decade, calling for joint efforts to promote cross-Strait peace and oppose "Taiwan independence."

  • Chinese FM Leaves Pyongyang KCNA 11 Apr 2026 -- Wang Yi, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and foreign minister of the People's Republic of China, left here on April 10 after visiting the Democratic People's Republic of Korea at the invitation of the DPRK Foreign Ministry.
  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Meets Chinese FM KCNA 11 Apr 2026 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un , General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and President of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, met Wang Yi, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and foreign minister of the People's Republic of China, on a visit to the DPRK, on April 10.

  • Nizar Amedi elected Iraq's new president after disputed parliamentary vote Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Iraq has elected the main candidate of the Patriotic Union of Kurdistan (PUK), Nizar Amedi, as the country's next president following a disputed voting process that saw several blocs abstain from participating in the session.

  • Netanyahu requests delay in corruption trial testimony amid Iran ceasefire Press TV 11 Apr 2026 -- Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has called on the court responsible for his corruption trial to postpone his testimony, citing "security concerns."
  • FM Sa'ar speaks with FM Francisco Pérez Mackenna of Chile Israel MFA 11 Apr 2026 -- "I thanked him for Chile's moral decision to withdraw from the anti-Israeli and hostile 'Hague Group.'"
